name: Sweeping Mandate
text:
Creatures you control get +2/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.
Mandate — If you control five or more Voters, they also gain trample and you may roll a six-sided die. On a 6, take an extra turn after this one. (It really was a landslide.)
flavorText: The people have spoken. Mostly they said "snacks," but a mandate is a mandate.
